purpose: Compare future style directions against the fig3 trap-retention benchmark before any source, SVG, acceptance, release-state, export, or golden mutation.

strengths: direct two-panel contrast between polarization-only PDMS and sulfur-polymer trap retention
fresh render, critique, and export evidence with no queue-visible scientific blocker
explicit physics invariants for capture direction, escape direction, trap placement, and trapped-electron anchoring
restrained manuscript schematic style that avoids data-figure overreach
weaknesses: may remain solid-manuscript rather than flagship visual
small labels and trap-level spacing can still benefit from bounded source polish
SVG polish readiness evidence is not yet positive and must not be assumed

forbidden_semantic_changes: change panel roles: panel a must remain PDMS clean bandgap and panel b must remain sulfur polymer trap mechanism
rename symbols, CB/VB, E_t, kT, injection, capture, thermal escape, shallow trap, or deep trap labels
swap shallow/deep trap color semantics or invert their relative positions
remove required labels, trapped-electron clusters, trap levels, injection arrows, capture arrows, or weak escape cues
use SVG polish to repair scientific, semantic, or label-target errors that belong in TikZ/source review

candidate_family_slots.label: Keep current style
candidate_family_slots.entry_condition: No candidate clearly improves manuscript value without increasing semantic or release risk.
candidate_family_slots.acceptance_rule: Accept as benchmark winner when alternatives only improve taste language or introduce semantic ambiguity.
candidate_family_slots.can_improve: Keeps the current restrained two-panel mechanism schematic as the benchmark while future candidates prove a real gain.
candidate_family_slots.semantic_changes_forbidden: May not change panel roles, trap labels, shallow/deep color semantics, trap positions, capture/escape cues, or trapped-electron anchoring.
candidate_family_slots.evidence_to_prove_better: A challenger must improve measurable checks or named aesthetic levers without adding hard regressions or semantic risk.
candidate_family_slots.human_only_question: Does the current restrained schematic already communicate the mechanism well enough for manuscript use?

candidate_family_slots.label: Restrained TikZ refinement
candidate_family_slots.entry_condition: A bounded source-level patch can improve typography, trap-level spacing, stroke rhythm, or label breathing room without changing meaning.
candidate_family_slots.acceptance_rule: Must preserve all forbidden semantics and improve at least one measurable check or named aesthetic lever.
candidate_family_slots.can_improve: Can improve typography, trap-level spacing, stroke rhythm, and label breathing room in source.
candidate_family_slots.semantic_changes_forbidden: May not change capture direction, escape direction, trap placement, trap-depth color meaning, or required labels.
candidate_family_slots.evidence_to_prove_better: Must improve at least one measurable check or named aesthetic lever while all forbidden trap semantics remain preserved.
candidate_family_slots.human_only_question: Is the remaining gap a bounded TikZ source-polish issue worth separate approval?

candidate_family_slots.label: Editorial redesign
candidate_family_slots.entry_condition: Human explicitly asks for a broader visual-language alternative after seeing benchmark tradeoffs.
candidate_family_slots.acceptance_rule: Must beat current style on mechanism contrast and journal fit while preserving panel roles, labels, color semantics, and trap physics.
candidate_family_slots.can_improve: Can explore a stronger mechanism contrast and broader visual language after benchmark tradeoffs are reviewed.
candidate_family_slots.semantic_changes_forbidden: May not trade trap physics, panel roles, label targets, color semantics, or mechanism contrast for prettier composition.
candidate_family_slots.evidence_to_prove_better: Must beat current style on mechanism contrast and journal fit with explicit semantic preservation evidence.
candidate_family_slots.human_only_question: Is a broader editorial redesign worth the additional semantic risk for this mechanism figure?

candidate_family_slots.label: SVG polish handoff
candidate_family_slots.entry_condition: TikZ/source semantics are locked and ready_for_svg_polish evidence is positive.
candidate_family_slots.acceptance_rule: May adjust only optical spacing, stroke finish, or texture nuance; semantic repair must return to TikZ/source review.
candidate_family_slots.can_improve: Can improve only optical spacing, stroke finish, texture nuance, and final presentation finish after source semantics are locked.
candidate_family_slots.semantic_changes_forbidden: May not repair scientific meaning, label targeting, trap semantics, or source-level defects in SVG space.
candidate_family_slots.evidence_to_prove_better: Requires positive ready_for_svg_polish evidence plus separate SVG artifact mutation approval before any artifact handoff.
candidate_family_slots.human_only_question: Should SVG polish remain blocked until explicit ready_for_svg_polish evidence exists?

must_pass: panel labels and role labels keep controlled hierarchy

measurable_checks.source: detector reports when rendered artifacts exist

human_only_questions: Does the current restrained two-panel schematic already communicate the mechanism well enough for manuscript use?
Is the remaining gap bounded source polish, or is a broader editorial redesign worth the semantic risk?
Should SVG polish remain blocked until explicit ready_for_svg_polish evidence exists?
Is this figure being promoted toward a flagship visual, or should it remain a restrained main-text concept schematic?
candidate_rejection_rules: reject a prettier candidate if it changes semantic meaning, panel roles, labels, trap positions, or color meaning
reject SVG polish if it is being used to fix source-level semantic defects
reject broad redesign if the only improvement is non-measurable taste language
reject any route that implies accepted-state, release-state, final-artifact, export, or golden mutation without a separate explicit gate
